backend/mvnw.cmd.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper batch script from version 3.2.0 to 3.3.4, replacing the legacy pure-batch implementation with a hybrid batch/Powershell script.
backend/mvnw.cmd.before: @REM Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.2.0
backend/mvnw.cmd.after: @REM Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.3.4

backend/mvnw.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper script from version 3.2.0 to 3.3.4 to support newer Maven features and security improvements.
backend/mvnw.before: # Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.2.0
backend/mvnw.after: # Apache Maven Wrapper startup batch script, version 3.3.4

backend/mvnw.general_idea: Refactor the script structure to use strict mode (set -euf) and modular functions for better error handling and maintainability.
Modernize OS detection and path handling to use native_path helper and simplified case statements for Cygwin/MinGW.
Replace the old wrapper JAR download mechanism with a direct Maven distribution download mechanism.
Add support for downloading and running Maven Daemon (mvnd) as an alternative to standard Maven.
Update checksum validation to verify the SHA-256 sum of the downloaded Maven distribution instead of the wrapper JAR.
Replace the execution of the wrapper JAR with direct execution of the downloaded Maven binary.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 3.2.0 to 4.0.2 to align with JDK 21 support and new framework features.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x does not fully support JDK 21 as a baseline; upgrading to 4.0.x is required for native JDK 21 compatibility and access to new APIs.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; the compiler and runtime must be configured to use Java 21 language features and bytecode.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace spring-boot-starter-web with spring-boot-starter-webmvc to adapt to Spring Boot 4.0 dependency structure changes.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 4.0 may have restructured web starters; using the specific webmvc starter ensures correct dependency resolution for MVC applications.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace spring-boot-starter-test with spring-boot-starter-webmvc-test to align with the new web starter structure.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Consistency with the webmvc starter requires using the corresponding test starter to ensure correct test dependencies are included.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit maven-compiler-plugin configuration as it is no longer needed with the updated parent POM.
Remove Lombok and MapStruct dependencies and their annotation processor configurations.
Remove JWT dependencies (jjwt-api, jjwt-impl, jjwt-jackson) as they are no longer included in the new POM.
Remove database dependencies (MySQL, H2) and JPA starter as they are no longer included in the new POM.
Remove validation, websocket, and mail starters as they are no longer included in the new POM.
Update groupId and artifactId to reflect a new project identity.
Add empty license, developer, and SCM metadata blocks to the POM.

backend/src/main/resources/application.p.general_idea: Replaced the comprehensive application configuration with a minimal single-line property.
backend/src/main/resources/application.p.before:
# Server Configuration
server.port=8080
server.servlet.context-path=/api

# Application Name
spring.application.name=energy-management-system

# Database Configuration (H2 for development)
spring.datasource.url=jdbc:h2:file:./data/emsdb;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1;DB_CLOSE_ON_EXIT=FALSE
spring.datasource.driverClassName=org.h2.Driver
spring.datasource.username=sa
spring.datasource.password=password
spring.h2.console.enabled=true
spring.h2.console.path=/h2-console

# JPA Configuration
spring.jpa.database-platform=org.hibernate.dialect.H2Dialect
spring.jpa.hibernate.ddl-auto=update
spring.jpa.show-sql=false
spring.jpa.properties.hibernate.format_sql=true

# JWT Configuration
jwt.secret=mySecretKeyForEnergyManagementSystem2026SecureTokenGeneration
jwt.expiration=86400000
jwt.refresh-expiration=604800000

# CORS Configuration
cors.allowed-origins=http://localhost:5173,http://localhost:5174,http://localhost:3000
cors.allowed-methods=GET,POST,PUT,DELETE,PATCH,OPTIONS
cors.allowed-headers=*
cors.allow-credentials=true

# File Upload
spring.servlet.multipart.max-file-size=10MB
spring.servlet.multipart.max-request-size=10MB

# Logging
logging.level.root=INFO
logging.level.com.ems=DEBUG
logging.level.org.springframework.security=DEBUG
logging.pattern.console=%d{yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} - %msg%n

# Actuator (for monitoring)
management.endpoints.web.exposure.include=health,info,metrics
management.endpoint.health.show-details=always

# OpenAPI/Swagger
springdoc.api-docs.path=/api-docs
springdoc.swagger-ui.path=/swagger-ui.html
springdoc.swagger-ui.operationsSorter=method
